Class Photo

java.lang.Object
photos.model.Photo
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class Photo extends Object implements Serializable
Represents one physical photo on disk. Identity is determined solely by the absolute file path, so if the same file is added to multiple albums, all albums share a single Photo instance, and any caption or tag changes are visible everywhere.
See Also:

    Two photos are equal if and only if they reference the same absolute file path.

  • Constructor Details

    • Photo

      public Photo(Path absolutePath)
      Constructs a new Photo referencing the given file.
      Parameters:
      absolutePath - path to the image file; converted to an absolute path
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if absolutePath is null

  • Method Details

    • getAbsolutePath

      public String getAbsolutePath()
      Returns the absolute file-system path of this photo.
      Returns:
      absolute path string

    • getCaption

      public String getCaption()
      Returns the user-supplied caption, or an empty string if none has been set.
      Returns:
      caption string (never null)

    • setCaption

      public void setCaption(String caption)
      Sets the caption. A null value is stored as an empty string.
      Parameters:
      caption - new caption

    • getDateTaken

      public Instant getDateTaken()
      Returns the capture date, derived from the file's last-modified time.
      Returns:
      date taken, or null if not yet set

    • setDateTaken

      public void setDateTaken(Instant dateTaken)
      Sets the capture date (typically the file's last-modified timestamp).
      Parameters:
      dateTaken - instant representing when the photo was taken

    • getTags

      public Set<Tag> getTags()
      Returns the mutable set of tags associated with this photo. Callers may add or remove tags directly.
      Returns:
      set of tags (insertion-ordered)

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Two photos are equal if and only if they reference the same absolute file path.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - object to compare
      Returns:
      true if both photos point to the same file

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
